plan_instructions: Write a maximally principled plan to accomplish the task.
implementation_instructions: Comprehensively, completely, and robustly implement the plan above. Do not cease until it is entirely implemented.
Work autonomously. Use a team where it makes sense.
Maintain a ## Worklog section in the plan file. Log what you did, blockers, tradeoffs, and test results as you go.

If you strongly feel the plan's architecture is wrong, document a ### Pushback in the worklog with concrete evidence (not preference) and your proposed alternative. You may implement the alternative if you document it.
review_instructions: Review this implementation against the plan.
Consider architecture: module boundaries, dependency directions, shared-code structure, integration test coverage.
Ignore code style, library choices, UI details, and micro-optimizations.
Enforce the plan; reject for structural deviations or incomplete implementations.
Evaluate any pushback; accept well-evidenced deviations from the plan only if you confident they make sense.
